curation.note: Corpus-purity discipline (run_cereals_002 NONCEREAL_RE precedent). Removed: ricotta/mascarpone/cooking cream (out of scope per Stress Test Sec 2.2); plant-based spreads (tofu/soy/almond/coconut — out of scope for dairy v1); butter/butter-spreads (not cheese); prepared pasta meals + cheese sauces; non-cheese 'white' items that leak via the adjective 'לבנה' (white beans שעועית לבנה, fish roe איקרה לבנה); napoleon CAKE (עוגת פס נפוליאון); 1 gruyère (hard). The >=90% coverage and 0%-insufficient exit criteria are evaluated on the DISPLAYABLE set.

gate_assessment.gtin13: PASS-WITH-NOTE (57.9% strict 13-digit; remainder are valid retailer barcodes of other lengths, all retailer_confirmed — fresh-cheese SKUs frequently use shorter internal codes)
gate_assessment.raw_nutrition_below_target: NOTE — the 90% target is met on the displayable set; raw-scrape 89.7% reflects 7 no-nutrition items curation correctly drops, not a coverage failure on shipped products.
gate_assessment.four_subpools_present: PASS — all four standing-precedent pools populated (labaneh is small at 3, reflecting the real shelf: most 'לבנה' SKUs are 'גבינה לבנה' = white cheese, correctly pooled to white_cheese_quark).

verdict_detail: BSIP0 acquisition is clean and complete: 116 real Shufersal products fetched with 0 failures; 57 in-scope displayable after corpus-purity curation; >=90% nutrition + ingredient coverage on the displayable set; 100% Hebrew names; all four sub-pools represented. No blocking data-acquisition issue. Proceeds to BSIP1 (already built) and BSIP2 scoring.
